global.heroEyebrow: Everything you need under one roof
global.heroSub: A family of premium home service brands helping busy families create cleaner, healthier and better run homes.

home.storyTitle: Everything You Need Under One Roof
home.storySub: ARC Home Services Group brings Australia's most trusted home service brands together under one relationship.
home.visionTitle: To be Australia's most trusted home services group.

services.title: One group. A specialist for every job.
services.intro: Each ARC brand has its own page and quote form. Pick the service you need and tell us about your home - one relationship looks after the rest.

about.title: Care for the whole home, under one roof.
about.intro: ARC brings a family of specialist home-service brands together under one trusted relationship - built on the Sydney heritage of 1800 CLEANER, and extended across the whole home.
about.missionTitle: One relationship. Many solutions. Everywhere you need us.
about.missionP1: Our mission is to take the running of the home off our clients' hands - bringing order, care and reliability to every corner of it, delivered by people they trust.
about.missionP2: Our vision is to be Australia's most trusted home services group: local teams delivering national standards, across Sydney and beyond.

contact.title: Tell us about your home.
contact.intro: Not sure which brand you need? Send a general enquiry and the ARC team will point you to the right specialist.

careers.title: Join a team that cares for homes.
careers.intro: We're building Australia's most trusted home services group. Open roles will be listed here soon - check back or contact the ARC team in the meantime.

news.title: Updates from ARC Home Services Group.
news.intro: Stories, announcements and ideas for a calmer, better-run home.

blog.title: Ideas for a calmer, better-run home.

1800cleaner.name: 1800 CLEANER
1800cleaner.short: Sydney's dust specialists - deep cleaning that actually lasts.
1800cleaner.blurb: For forty years, 1800 CLEANER has focused on what most cleaners skip: the dust you can't see.
1800cleaner.intro: Part of ARC Home Management Services, with the same vetted-team standards - but led by dust science, not a quick wipe-over. Regular and deep cleans scoped to your home, your family and how you live.
1800cleaner.formIntro: Tell us about your home and we'll recommend a 1800 CLEANER plan - no obligation.
1800cleaner.messagePlaceholder: e.g. 4-bed home in Rose Bay, dust on surfaces within days of cleaning, interested in regular fortnightly visits…
bullets: Specialist dust removal for healthier indoor air
Regular and deep home cleaning
The same trained team, visit after visit
Plans tailored to your rooms and schedule

halo.name: HALO HOUSEKEEPING
halo.tagline: A home that always feels ready.
halo.short: Thoughtful housekeeping that brings calm, comfort and care to your home.
halo.blurb: HALO HOUSEKEEPING is for households that want the reset handled before they walk in the door.
halo.intro: Dishes done, beds turned, laundry moving, surfaces clear - one regular rhythm with the same team, so your home always feels ready and you carry less mental load.
halo.formIntro: Share how your household runs and we'll suggest a HALO HOUSEKEEPING schedule that fits.
halo.messagePlaceholder: e.g. family of four, need morning resets twice a week, laundry is the main pain point…
bullets: Kitchen reset - benches, dishes and appliances cleared
Laundry washed, dried, folded and put away
Beds made and linen rotated on your schedule
Daily tidy, light organising and room-to-room reset

greengate.name: ELF GARDENING
greengate.tagline: Love your garden. Enjoy your weekend.
greengate.short: Regular lawn and garden care across Sydney's leafy suburbs.
greengate.blurb: ELF GARDENING keeps lawns edged, hedges shaped and garden beds tidy on a reliable schedule.
greengate.intro: Your garden stays presentable through the seasons - and Saturday stays yours, not another backyard chore list.
greengate.formIntro: Describe your garden and how often you'd like us - we'll quote from there.
greengate.messagePlaceholder: e.g. corner block in Vaucluse, lawn plus front hedges, fortnightly mow preferred, side access through gate…
bullets: Lawn mowing and crisp edging
Hedge, shrub and small-tree trimming
Weeding, blow-down and garden tidy-ups
Seasonal clean-ups - leaves, cut-back and clearance

invisible.name: INVISIBLE
invisible.short: Interior and exterior glass - streak-free, detail-first.
invisible.blurb: INVISIBLE does the work you notice only when it's done: clear glass, clean tracks and sills, and more light in every room.
invisible.intro: Forty years of streak-free finishes across Sydney - from single-storey terraces to multi-level homes with challenging access.
invisible.formIntro: Let us know your windows and access - we'll confirm scope and timing.
invisible.messagePlaceholder: e.g. two-storey home in Mosman, interior and exterior, ~18 panes, some high windows from balcony access…
bullets: Interior and exterior window glass
Frames, tracks, sills and flyscreens wiped down
Streak-free finish on glass doors and pool fencing
One-off sparkle or a regular visit schedule

purepools.name: PURE POOLS
purepools.short: Scheduled pool care - balanced water, ready when you are.
purepools.blurb: PURE POOLS handles testing, skimming and equipment checks on a timetable you set.
purepools.intro: Safe, balanced, swim-ready water - without spending Sunday at the filter box or guessing chemical levels.
purepools.formIntro: Tell us about your pool and how often you'd like it serviced.
purepools.messagePlaceholder: e.g. saltwater pool in Double Bay, weekly service, often leaves after nor'easters, pump recently replaced…
bullets: Water testing, balancing and chemical adjustments
Skimming, vacuuming and basket clearance
Filter, pump and equipment visual checks
Weekly, fortnightly or seasonal visit plans

revive.name: REVIVE
revive.short: Driveways, decks and facades refreshed with care.
revive.blurb: REVIVE lifts years of grime from the surfaces that frame your home.
revive.intro: Driveways, paths, patios and exterior walls - using the right pressure for each material, not a one-setting blast that damages stone, timber or render.
revive.formIntro: Send the surfaces you want refreshed - photos help, but a short description is fine.
revive.messagePlaceholder: e.g. sandstone driveway in Bellevue Hill, green algae in shaded section, plus rear timber deck…
bullets: Driveways, paths and stepping-stone areas
Patios, decking and outdoor entertaining zones
House facades, boundary walls and rendered surfaces
Mould, algae and ground-in dirt on outdoor stone and tile

restore.name: FRESH
restore.tagline: Breathe easier from the ground up.
restore.short: Carpet and upholstery shampooing that lifts deep-down dirt, stains and odours.
restore.blurb: FRESH reaches into fibres most vacuums leave behind.
restore.intro: Embedded dirt, odours and allergens lifted from carpets, rugs and soft furnishings - so rooms feel genuinely fresh underfoot, not just vacuumed on the surface.
restore.formIntro: Describe the rooms, fabrics and any stains or odours you'd like us to look at.
restore.messagePlaceholder: e.g. wool rugs in living room, light sofa with pet odour, 3 bedrooms wall-to-wall carpet, kids' traffic areas…
bullets: Carpet steam cleaning for high-traffic and living areas
Rug and runner cleaning, including delicate fibres
Lounge, dining and bedroom upholstery
Targeted stain, pet and odour treatment

unclebob.name: UNCLE MIKE
unclebob.tagline: The handyman you wish was family.
unclebob.short: The small repairs and fixes that sit on your list for months.
unclebob.blurb: UNCLE MIKE is the person you trust inside your home for the niggling jobs.
unclebob.intro: A door that sticks, shelves that need mounting, silicone that's gone mouldy, or a batch of odd jobs before guests arrive - handled discreetly, respectfully and properly.
unclebob.formIntro: List the jobs you've been putting off - we'll let you know what we can tackle in one visit.
unclebob.messagePlaceholder: e.g. re-hang bathroom door, mount three shelves in study, replace kitchen silicone, fix loose deck railing…
bullets: General repairs, adjustments and maintenance
TV, art, shelving and fixture mounting
Touch-up painting, silicone and sealant refresh
Pre-season checks - gutters, fittings and odd jobs batch

ecolove.name: ecoLove low-tox products
ecolove.tagline: Clean with care. Live with love.
ecolove.short: Low-tox, in-house cleaning products - safe around kids and pets.
ecolove.blurb: ecoLove uses in-house, low-tox products that cut through everyday grime without harsh fumes.
ecolove.intro: A better fit for families, allergy-sensitive homes and anyone who wants a clean home without the chemical hangover - products made and used by our own team.
ecolove.formIntro: Tell us who lives in your home and what you'd like cleaned - we'll match the right ecoLove approach.
ecolove.messagePlaceholder: e.g. toddler and a dog, chemical scents are a trigger, need fortnightly clean of kitchen and bathrooms…
bullets: Low-tox formulas developed and used in-house
Effective on kitchens, bathrooms and living areas
Safer choice for children, pets and sensitive skin
Gentle on surfaces, finishes and indoor air
